title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Dick Costolo discusses the timing, positioning, and prospects of IPOs for SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic. The podcast examines differences among the three companies, factors affecting IPO order and success, and broader questions about whether AI companies constitute genuine platforms.
